summary: Completed frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control iteration 8 - Major UI redesign. All 20 requested features tested and verified. Key changes: 1) Model selector redesigned from hover-based to click-based with smart positioning (drops up/down based on space), 2) 6 providers with models panel appearing LEFT of providers, 3) Cost badges ($, $$, $$$, Free), Context badges (2M, 256K), and Capability icons, 4) Venice shows 8 models initially with 'more...' button, 5) Suggestion cards REMOVED from HomePage, 6) Agent sparkles icon added next to + button linking to /agent.
passed_tests: Model selector opens when clicking 'Select model' trigger
Model selector shows 6 providers (huggingface, ollama, opencode, opencode-go, openrouter, venice)
Clicking a provider shows its models in a side panel (LEFT of providers)
Each model shows Cost badge ($, $$, $$$, Free), Context badge (if available), and Capability icons
Venice provider shows 8 models initially with 'more...' button at bottom
Clicking 'more...' expands to show all models for that provider (31 models for Venice)
Clicking a model selects it and closes the dropdown
Selected model name persists in the trigger button (e.g., 'Claude Opus 4.6')
Clicking same provider toggles models panel off (verified with background color change)
Model selector closes when clicking outside
Model selector smart positioning - drops UP when near bottom of screen
No suggestion cards below the chat input (Select a model, Try Agent, Deep Research, Mission Control are REMOVED)
Agent sparkles icon exists next to + button in InputBar (data-testid='agent-shortcut-btn')
Agent sparkles icon links to /agent and navigates correctly
Plus menu (+) opens and shows all sub-menus (Skills, Connectors, Style)
Skills sub-menu shows all 8 skills (deep-research, code-review, web-scraper, file-manager, task-scheduler, mcp-builder, slack-gif-creator, canvas-design)
Connectors sub-menu shows all 6 connectors with toggles
Style sub-menu shows all 4 options (Normal, Concise, Formal, Explanatory)
Chat input and send functionality works
New thread button works
Sidebar navigation works for all tabs (Chat, Agent, Dashboard, Jobs, Approvals, Spaces, Settings, Cowork, Customize)
Cowork page renders task grid correctly (21 task cards)
Settings page loads with all 5 tabs (General, Profile, Connected Apps, Data Controls, Security)
Agent page loads with 4 capability toggles (Image Generation, Design Creation, Code Execution, Web Browsing)
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 20+ requested features tested and working. Key iteration 8 changes verified: 1) Model selector completely redesigned - click-based with smart positioning (drops up when near bottom), providers panel on RIGHT, models panel on LEFT, 2) Cost badges ($, $$, $$$, Free), Context badges (2M, 256K, 125K), and 6 capability icons per model, 3) Venice shows 8 models initially with 'more...' button that expands to show all 31 models, 4) Provider toggle works (clicking same provider closes models panel), 5) Four suggestion cards REMOVED from HomePage empty state, 6) Agent sparkles icon added to InputBar next to + button, links to /agent. All APIs remain MOCKED via Zustand store.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response with streaming), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), cancelJob (state update), approveRequest/rejectRequest (state update), createThread/deleteThread (localStorage), addSpace (localStorage), Agent responses (simulated with setTimeout delay)
